Blue Beetle (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $72,541,501Details
International Box Office $58,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $130,841,501
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,318,971
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,398,092
Total $3,717,063
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Recent college grad Jaime Reyes returns home full of aspirations for his future, only to find that home is not quite as he left it. As he searches to find his purpose in the world, fate intervenes when Jaime unexpectedly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology: the Scarab. When the Scarab suddenly chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he is bestowed with an incredible suit of armor capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the super hero Blue Beetle.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$25,030,225 (34.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,871 opening theaters/3,871 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $79,304,966

Synopsis

Recent college grad Jaime Reyes returns home full of aspirations for his future, only to find that home is not quite as he left it. As he searches to find his purpose in the world, fate intervenes when Jaime unexpectedly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology: the Scarab. When the Scarab suddenly chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he is bestowed with an incredible suit of armor capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the super hero Blue Beetle.
